summary: A direct 3-4-3 / 5-4-1 that finds the front three quickly and defends deep — but with big gaps when the back-5 sits too low. Arab Cup finalists.
style: 3-4-3 / 5-4-1 — direct play to find the front three, wing-backs overlapping, crosses into the box, quick play behind; drop into a mid/low-block.

counterReliance.note: Direct to the front-3, quick play behind from a deep block

strengths: Direct supply to the front three with quick play behind
Reached the Arab Cup final (narrow loss to Morocco)
weaknesses: Big defensive gaps when the back-5 sits too deep

keyPlayers.name: Mousa Tamari
keyPlayers.note: Creativity (34 chances created), pacey dribbler with 'mixed' success, 12 goal involvements in Ligue 1

tactics: Go direct to the front three, overlap the wing-backs and play quickly behind, then drop into a deep block. The gaps in a too-deep back-5 are the vulnerability.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
